visual_description: A young man with glasses and a brown jacket stands in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with glassware and furniture. Behind him, two men in dark clothing point wands forward, standing in a line with focused postures. The man in front gazes forward with a neutral expression, while the two behind him maintain steady stances, their wands aimed outward.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and pace, speaking in a neutral tone without any noticeable inflection or background noise.
